name: Christmas Candy Canes
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, water, corn syrup, and cream of tartar in a saucepan. Heat until the sugar dissolves completely.
2. Divide the mixture into two saucepans. Boil each batch separately until they reach 280 degrees Fahrenheit.
3. Add half a teaspoon of peppermint to one of the batches and red vegetable coloring to the other.
4. Cool the cooled syrup on an oiled enamel or marble surface.
5. Stretch and pull the colored syrup into thin ropes, twisting them repeatedly.
6. Form the twisted ropes into candy cane shapes.
7. Allow the candy canes to harden on an oiled surface before decorating your Christmas tree.
